papers.title: Pushing the limits of unconstrained MLIPs (PET-OAM-XL)
papers.contribution: UPET architecture; 730M params; #1 Matbench Discovery (CPS=0.898, F1=0.924).

papers.title: PET-MAD
papers.contribution: Lightweight universal MLIP competitive with larger models via 'Massive Atomistic Diversity' training.

papers.title: eSEN
papers.contribution: Identifies PES smoothness as critical; direct-force pre-training; #2 Matbench Discovery. 30M params ~ 730M performance.

papers.title: MACE-MP-0
papers.contribution: Universal potential covering 89 elements; most widely used open-source MLIP.

papers.title: MatterSim
papers.contribution: 89 elements, 0-5000K, 0-1000 GPa; 10x accuracy for finite-T/P properties.

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence Driving Materials Discovery?
papers.contribution: GNoME critique: 'scant evidence for novelty, credibility, and utility' in 380K predictions.

papers.title: Systematic softening in universal MLIPs
papers.contribution: Systematic PES softening in M3GNet/CHGNet/MACE for surfaces, defects, phonons; caused by biased near-equilibrium training data.

papers.title: Performance Assessment of UIPs for Surfaces
papers.contribution: Surface energy calculations show significant shortcomings; errors correlate with distance from bulk training.

papers.title: AI is dreaming up millions of new materials. Are they any good?
papers.contribution: Balanced assessment: 'critics slammed attempts but genuine progress behind the hype'.

papers.title: A practical guide to MLIPs
papers.venue: Curr. Opin. Solid State Mater. Sci. 35:101214
papers.contribution: Comprehensive review of MLIP capabilities, limitations, and selection guidance.

papers.title: Universal MLIPs for reduced dimensionality (0123D)
papers.contribution: Most models show 'considerable' errors for 0D systems; eSEN best overall. Establishes that current UIPs are 'periodic bulk' potentials.

papers.title: LLaMat: LLMs for materials research
papers.contribution: 30B-token materials LLM; smaller specialized models outperform larger general ones.

papers.title: MatSciAgent
papers.contribution: Multi-agent LLM framework achieving 100% success in parameter extraction.

papers.title: A framework to evaluate machine learning crystal stability predictions (Matbench Discovery)
papers.contribution: Matbench Discovery benchmark paper. 45 ranked models. Defines CPS and F1 metrics for stability prediction.

papers.title: Foundation models for materials discovery -- current state and future directions
papers.contribution: Comprehensive survey of foundation models in materials science.

papers.title: Universal machine learning interatomic potentials are ready for phonons
papers.contribution: Benchmark showing uMLIPs are ready for phonon calculations.

papers.title: Foundation models for atomistic simulation of chemistry and materials
papers.contribution: 2026 review of foundation models for atomistic simulation.
